creator: Dubroom.com
description: DUBROOM STAR SELECTIONS NET LABEL CREATIVE COMMONS ARCHIVES 1997-2011 ARCHIVE.org hosts all the Creative Commons releases from the Dubroom's Net Label. Not all releases from this Net Label are released under creative commons, and Dubroom productions from the years 2014 and beyond are also released under standard copyright. Throughout the years, the Dubroom has released hundreds of tracks which you can all find at http://music.dubroom.org.mp3.htm and http://messiandread.dubroom.org/mp3.htm . You can also find Messian Dread's Creative Commons archives at youtube at this channel: http://www.youtube.com/dubroomdread .  Feel free to share the Creative Commons releases, but do NOT use them commercially, please CREDIT Messian Dread and/or Dubroom, and do NOT use this music for ANY commercial releases before acquiring specific written permission. http://contact.dubroom.org CREATIVE COMMONS CATALOGUE 1997-2011 DUBROOM PRODUCTIONS EXTRA Messian Dread, Jah Roots, Dubster Connection -
